# Pi Agent Orchestrator

> Multi-agent orchestration extension for the Pi coding-agent host, including sub-agents, structured handoffs, swarms, scheduling, prompt compression, and a responsive TUI.

## Primary documentation

- [Overview and installation](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/README.md)
- [Architecture](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/docs/architecture.md)
- [API reference](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/docs/api-reference.md)
- [Custom agents](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/docs/custom-agents.md)
- [Coding-agent repository guide](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/AGENTS.md)

## Machine-readable context

- [Expanded context](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/llms-full.txt)
- [Markdown site mirror](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/index.md)
- [Human-readable sitemap](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/sitemap.md)
- [XML sitemap](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/sitemap.xml)

- [Real terminal showcase](https://orchestrator.chefgroep.online/assets/dashboard_preview.mp4)
